## Summary

Describe the public behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] A failing test was added or the reason no test applies is documented.
- [ ] Focused tests pass offline.
- [ ] Ruff, mypy, English-surface, schema/preset, and clean-wheel checks pass where applicable.
- [ ] Public documentation and schemas match the implementation.

## Trust And Data

- [ ] No credentials, raw provider payloads, personal paths, generated outputs, caches, attachments, or protected logos are included.
- [ ] Factual data has citations, retrieval time, normalization notes, and a redistribution basis.
- [ ] External provider behavior is not presented as a stable internal contract.
